# Richard Lozada

> Full-stack software engineer with ~10 years of experience, from developer to
> Technical Lead at Openbank (Grupo Santander). Self-taught, currently based in
> Madrid, Spain. Works across web, mobile and cloud.

## About

- Name: Richard Lozada
- Role: Technical Lead — Frontend at Openbank (Grupo Santander), owning the
  security vertical's frontend end-to-end (architecture, code, mentoring).
- Experience: ~10 years. Path through Venezuela, Colombia, Chile and Spain,
  shipping for brands like LATAM Airlines, Cencosud and Falabella.
- Stack: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, Astro, Ruby on Rails, Java/Spring,
  Node.js, React Native, Kotlin, Swift, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes.
- Certifications: Oracle Certified Associate (Java SE 8), AWS Certified Cloud
  Practitioner, CertiProf Lifelong Learning, Platzi Blockchain & Cryptocurrencies.

## Links

- Website: https://richardlozada.com/
- Website (Spanish): https://richardlozada.com/es/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Lozadaa
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/richardlozada/
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/Lozadapp
- Email: hi@richardlozada.com

## Projects

- TreeHealth — collaborative family health map (React, TypeScript, Ruby on Rails).
- Vzla Terremoto Info — humanitarian PWA for earthquake emergencies in Venezuela
  (Next.js, Supabase, Leaflet, TypeScript). https://vzla.info
- FlareRead — free open-source EPUB reader (Electron, React, TypeScript).
- dexteria — AI Project Executor (TypeScript, AI). https://dexteriapp.com
- Abastece Combustible (2015) — gas-station availability app used by 10,000+
  people in Venezuela; co-built at age 17. Covered in press and TV.
